---
name: create-instructions
description: Describe when to use this prompt
agent: instructions-generator
---

<!-- Tip: Use /create-prompt in chat to generate content with agent assistance -->

Take the information below and generate a concise and clear .md instructions file in markdown format for the /docs directory. TIf a .md filename is provided, use that as the filename, otherwise generate a filename based on the title of the instructions. The instructions should be clear, concise, and easy to follow. Make sure to update the Agents.md to reference this new docs file. If no information is provided below, prompt the user to give the necessary details about the layer of architecture or coding standards to document.
